Progress to targets

Engine gap: 375,415 shares ≈ ₱285,315 at ₱0.76. Anchor gap: 2,183 shares ≈ ₱15,892.

RCR — anchor target7,817 / 10,000 (78.2%)

Exit scenarios — audited (red-team, 2026-07-04)

Net of 0.6% sale tax. Audit verdict: ₱1.15–1.28 is the honest ceiling for the two-project story; ₱1.55 is a tail case; ₱1.80 was struck as fantasy and is not charted. Left panel measures against today's market value (fill your true cost basis into ledger.csv for exact P/L); right panel against the 500k plan basis of ₱425,941 (0.85 blended fill).

The accumulation race — pace vs the re-rate window

Shares held by month at three funding paces (₱0.82 average fill, dividends reinvested quarterly). The shaded band is when the audit says the re-rate must land (COD → 2028) for the trade to earn its risk. A line crossing 500k after the band means the target is reached only if the thesis stalls — the accumulation paradox.

₱8k/mo — Sep 2029₱16k/mo — Mar 2028₱24k/mo — Aug 2027
table view
PaceReaches 500kInside re-rate window?
₱8k/moSep 2029at risk
₱16k/moMar 2028at risk
₱24k/moAug 2027yes

The ₱8,000 rule, priced honestly

Effective all-in buy fee by clip size (0.25% commission with ₱20 minimum, +VAT +PSE +SCCP). ₱8,000 is where the minimum stops binding (0.30%). Below it the flat ₱≈23 dominates — acceptable leakage above the ₱2,500 sanity floor, real bleed below it. Long-horizon verdict: clips under ₱8k are allowed; clips under ₱2.5k are not.

Assumptions: book value ₱0.91/sh; plan basis = existing at ₱0.85 + gap at 0.85 incl. fees; race at ₱0.82 fill; RCR DPS ₱0.11/qtr, 10% WHT. Scenario prices and tags from the red-team audit in playbook.md §9. Personal working document — not investment advice.
